tool.name: kg_add_node
tool.description: Add a node to the knowledge graph. Graph enables attack path discovery across hosts / services / credentials / findings / sessions / users / tokens.

parameter.name: kind
parameter.description: host / service / credential / finding / session / user / token / path

tool.name: kg_add_edge
tool.description:
Add a directed edge between two graph nodes. Edge kinds: hosts_service, runs_on, accessible_from, leaks, pivots_to, authenticates_with, grants_access, exploits, chains_to, owned_by, child_of, maps_to_cve.
Use weight <1 for easy/high-confidence paths, >1 for difficult ones. Attack path discovery uses Dijkstra so lower total weight = preferred chain.

tool.name: kg_find_attack_paths
tool.description:
Discover multi-hop attack chains ending at target node.
Returns paths ordered by total weight (easiest chain first). Use to answer 'what combination of findings leads to compromise of <critical resource>?' — automatically chains IDOR + leaked creds + SSRF + RCE etc.

tool.name: kg_shortest_path
tool.description: Shortest path between two graph nodes by edge weight.

tool.name: kg_summary
tool.description: Graph statistics + mermaid diagram snippet for visualization in panel.
